title: [AI slop] Fabric-seasons
description: Just another fork to newer version 99% by AI
body:
This is a fork of Fabric Season to newer version made by AI 99%.

You can see the original mod [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons). 

"A simple mod that adds seasons to the game, dynamically changing biomes as you play."

It fine also when install on server only but it is recommended to install both side to have full experience
